# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

const DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
    enableAnalytics: true,
    enableCaching: true,
  },
  RATE_LIMIT: 100,
  TIMEOUT_MS: 5000,
};

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request) {
  try {
    let apiKey = DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY;
    let dbUrl = DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL;
    let featureFlags = DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS;
    let rateLimit = DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT;
    let timeoutMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.TIMEOUT_MS;

    if (process.env.EDGE_CONFIG) {
      try {
        const edgeConfigApiKey = await get<string>('API_KEY');
        const edgeConfigDbUrl = await get<string>('DB_URL');
        const edgeConfigFeatureFlags = await get<Record<string, boolean>>('FEATURE_FLAGS');
        const edgeConfigRateLimit = await get<number>('RATE_LIMIT');
        const edgeConfigTimeoutMs = await get<number>('TIMEOUT_MS');

        if (edgeConfigApiKey !== undefined) apiKey = edgeConfigApiKey;
        if (edgeConfigDbUrl !== undefined) dbUrl = edgeConfigDbUrl;
        if (edgeConfigFeatureFlags !== undefined) featureFlags = edgeConfigFeatureFlags;
        if (edgeConfigRateLimit !== undefined) rateLimit = edgeConfigRateLimit;
        if (edgeConfigTimeoutMs !== undefined) timeoutMs = edgeConfigTimeoutMs;
      } catch (edgeConfigError) {
        console.warn('Failed to read from Edge Config, using defaults:', edgeConfigError);
      }
    }

    const url = new URL(request.url);
    const path = url.pathname;

    if (path === '/api/config') {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          apiKey: apiKey.substring(0, 10) + '...',
          dbUrl: dbUrl.split('@')[1] || 'hidden',
          featureFlags,
          rateLimit,
          timeoutMs,
          source: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'edge-config' : 'defaults',
        }),
        {
          status: 200,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'Cache-Control': 'public, max-age=60',
          },
        }
      );
    }

    if (path === '/api/feature') {
      const feature = url.searchParams.get('name');
      if (!feature) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({ error: 'Feature name required' }),
          {
            status: 400,
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          }
        );
      }

      const isEnabled = featureFlags[feature as keyof typeof featureFlags] ?? false;

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          feature,
          enabled: isEnabled,
        }),
        {
          status: 200,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'Cache-Control': 'public, max-age=60',
          },
        }
      );
    }

    if (path === '/api/data') {
      const authHeader = request.headers.get('Authorization');
      const providedKey = authHeader?.replace('Bearer ', '');

      if (providedKey !== apiKey) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized' }),
          {
            status: 401,
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          }
        );
      }

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          message: 'Data access granted',
          dbUrl: dbUrl.split('@')[1] || 'connected',
          rateLimit,
          timeoutMs,
        }),
        {
          status: 200,
          headers: {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'X-Rate-Limit': rateLimit.toString(),
          },
        }
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        message: 'Edge Function with Edge Config',
        endpoints: {
          config: '/api/config - Get configuration summary',
          feature: '/api/feature?name=<feature> - Check feature flag',
          data: '/api/data - Access protected data (requires API key)',
        },
        edgeConfigStatus: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ? 'configured' : 'not-configured',
      }),
      {
        status: 200,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
      }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: 'Internal server error',
        message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error',
      }),
      {
        status: 500,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }
}
